parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {"model":"llama-3.1-8b-instant","temperature":0.2,"response_format":{"type":"json_object"},"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are an expert ISO 27001 lead auditor. You produce concise, actionable compliance gap analysis and always respond with a single valid JSON object."},{"role":"user","content":"Analyze the following ISO 27001 control and its current evidence.
Control ID: " + $json.Control_ID + "
Control Name: " + $json.Control_Name + "
Requirement: " + $json.Requirement + "
Category: " + $json.Category + "
Current Status: " + ($json.Status || "Missing - no evidence provided") + "
Evidence Provided: " + ($json.Evidence_Provided || "None") + "
Auditor Notes: " + ($json.Notes || "None") + "

Return ONLY a JSON object with these keys: gap_description (string), risk_impact (string), remediation (string, recommended remediation steps), priority (one of Critical, High, Medium, Low), timeline (suggested remediation timeframe such as 30 days, 60 days, 90 days)."}]} }}

assignments.name: Gap_Description
assignments.value: No gap identified - control is compliant.
